---
title: "Project 1"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: flatly
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(plotly)

data <- data.frame(
  category = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E"),
  value = c(23, 45, 12, 67, 34)
)
```


```{r}
#| output: asis
cat('<a href="../index.html" class="back-link">← Back</a>')
```

## Chart

```{r}
plot_ly(data, x = ~category, y = ~value, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = "#00BCD4")) |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(title = "Category"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Value"),
    plot_bgcolor = "white",
    paper_bgcolor = "white"
  )
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
